Export HD videos optimized for TikTok videos, Instagram Reel videos, YouTube Shorts videos, and other major video platforms. 【 Simple. Fast. name: Calendars: 스케줄 리마인더 & 타임플래너
source_text: Calendars: 스케줄 리마인더 & 타임플래너 Productivity calendar Own your time. With Calendars by Readdle, you take control of your schedule across all your Apple devices – iPhone, iPad, Mac, and Apple Watch. Become a more organized version of yourself like 30 million people around the globe who have already chosen Calendars by Readdle. What makes Calendars by Readdle different is that it brings all your schedules, calendars, routines, and tasks together to view at a glance. OWN YOUR TIME: *** ALL CALENDARS AND TASKS IN ONE PLACE Bring everything together to see the full picture of your day. Add multiple calendars from Google, iCloud, or Outlook as well as Google Tasks and Reminders. *** TASK MANAGER Easy to use task manager with task lists that has everything you need to organize, track and complete your to-dos. *** OPTIMAL MONTH, WEEK, AND DAY VIEWS Calendars illustrates your schedule on an iPhone screen in the best possible way. Event names and tasks are readable on the month view. See the whole week at a glance with the unique week view. *** EASY COLOR-CODING Color-code your events to segment things happening daily. Great for students to keep track of class timetables. And for parents to track family schedules. *** POWER UP! • Natural language input: Want to meet John at Starbucks at 4 p.m.? Just type this, and Calendars creates the event. • Video calls support: set up video calls while creating events and jump into Zoom, Meet, or GoToMeeting right from Calendars. • Customizable recurring events: create events for regular things to do every week, month, or even every 3rd Tuesday of the month. • Offline mode: All changes will be synced onto your account once you are online. • Interesting calendars: Never miss a sports event or your favorite TV show • Widgets, weather and more! One subscription works for all platforms. For those who already have a subscription for the Calendars app on their iPhones, you get all the new features and access to the Mac version at no extra cost: • If you have previously subscribed to the PRO plan for the iOS Calendars app, you can now also get it free on your Mac too, including the new Planner feature exclusively available on MacOS. • Users who don’t have a subscription for the Calendars by Readdle iOS app can still enjoy the basic version of Calendars for Mac. Privacy Policy: https://readdle.com/calendars/legal/privacy Terms of Service: https://readdle.com/calendars/legal/terms Have questions, comments, or issues? Don’t hesitate to reach out to us at http://readdle.com/contact

name: Structured - 데일리 플래너
source_text: Structured - 데일리 플래너 Productivity calendar habit productivity todo 하루를 명확하고 간단하게 계획하세요. Structured는 *캘린더, 할 일, 루틴, 습관*을 하나의 시각적 타임라인으로 통합합니다. 150만 명 이상의 사용자가 더 차분하게 집중하고 생산성을 높이고 있습니다. 업무, 공부, 여행 등 어떤 상황에서도 완벽하게 활용하세요. 몇 분 만에 계획을 세우고 하루를 효율적으로 관리해 보세요. 무료로 시작하세요: - 직관적인 타임라인에서 하루와 일주일 일정 관리 - 아이디어를 인박스에 바로 기록하고 나중에 정리 - iPhone, iPad, Apple Watch, Mac 간 동기화 - 큰 프로젝트를 노트와 하위 작업으로 세분화 - 포모도로 타이머, 실시간 활동, 위젯으로 집중 유지 - 색상과 아이콘으로 나만의 플래너 꾸미기 - 다양한 시간대에 맞춰 손쉽게 일정 관리 - VoiceOver, 음성 제어, 난독증 친화 글꼴 등 접근성 기능 지원 Structured Pro로 업그레이드: - 캘린더와 미리 알림을 연결해 전체 일정 한눈에 보기 - 반복 작업과 루틴을 만들어 꾸준함 유지 - Structured AI로 자연어 입력으로 하루 자동 생성 - 놓친 작업 자동 재계획 - 나만의 워크플로에 맞게 알림 맞춤 설정 Structured Pro는 월간, 연간 또는 평생 이용권으로 제공됩니다. 약관 및 개인정보: https://structured.app/legal

name: The Grid - Calendar
source_text: The Grid - Calendar Productivity calendar Boldly redefine your calendar. Do you want a calendar that is beautiful and simple to use so you can check and change your schedule in seconds, not minutes? The Grid aims to do just that. With text right on your calendar you can see everything at a glance. And with the calendar filter bar always up, you can view the events of only the calendar you need with just one tap. Need to create an event you use all the time, templates are built right in. Need to re-schedule, drag-n-drop an event to another day. Its all so easy you'll wonder why every calendar doesn't do it this way. At first glance it might look too simple. But isn't that what a calendar should be?! .....::::: Features :::::..... • Show event text right on your calendar. • Filter by calendars with one touch. • Uses the default calendar events so advanced syncing is possible(Exchange, Google, iCloud). • Use Templates to create frequently used events. • Drag -n- Drop to move events on the calendar. • Copy and paste your events. • Natural Language Entry • Time Zone Support • Full Search(Pro) • Convert Events to Reminders(Pro) • Convert Reminders to Events(Pro) • Week Numbers • Create advanced repeating event options. • Create multiple alarms for an event. • Email events with iCalendar attachments. • Text, Tweet, or post events to Facebook. • Optimized for startup speed. • InApp Purchases offer Search, Reminder Support, and the new Week Strip View. .....::::: Use :::::..... Let's say you are a busy mom scheduling all your family's activities. Well little Bobby's coach just added a soccer game on Thursday. And little Alison's dentist appointment just got moved to the same time the next day. And you need to know what your husband's schedule looks like next Tuesday. Ready. Go. 1. Tap on Bobby's calendar. Go to Thursday and hit the "Template" button. Hit 'Soccer Match' from the list. Scheduled. 2. Tap Alison's calendar. Click on the dentist appointment day. Drag it from the bottom list onto the next day in the month. Rescheduled. 3. Click on your Husband's calendar. There it is. That is 10 seconds of your day you will not get back.... Now try it on your current calendar, we'll WAIT.... Now imagine using that wherever and whoever you are; running the office, travel, family, school, activities. It all fits well. With a little initial calendar planning, you can have the most efficient and organized schedule on the block. Add in syncing and your family or office can all share calendars for more power. Your day just got a lot clearer. .....::::: What they say :::::..... "Check and change your schedule in a snap with Birdsoft’s beautifully simple calendar app, The Grid." - AppAdvice AppsGoneFree Feature. "this calendar was smooth, hiccup free, and brought a fresh look to the boring calendar in iOS." - TheiPhoneAddict Review .....::::: Support :::::..... Watch a video showing the power of the app at http://grid.birdsoft.biz. Email us at info@birdsoft.biz
